notes: C3531 Lead: URGENT bectly directive — cleanup scripts pass2..6 destroyed original Vinted descriptions (92/355 products mention defects that are now lost in DB but still exist in scripts/vinted-data/products.json). 2 new BOLT tasks queued HIGH PRIORITY: #234 add Product.vintedId + originalDescription + originalVintedData JSON fields to schema, migrate, then scripts/restore-vinted-originals.ts matches DB products to products.json by vintedId/title and restores originalDescription + full original record as permanent backup (also overwrites empty/garbage description fields + restores material/measurements/color/brand/size if empty). #235 depends on #234: scripts/extract-defects-from-descriptions.ts parses Czech defect keywords (skvrna/žmolky/odření/vybledlá/díra/chybějící knoflík/poškozený zip/uvolněný šev/zažloutlý/opotřebení etc.) from originalDescription, maps to DefectType enum in src/lib/defects.ts, detects severity from context (drobná=minor, výrazná=moderate), writes to Product.defects JSON. Both tasks: --dry-run default, --apply flag. Priority after #230/#231 email work: #234 → #235 → then #233 → #232. Bectly action still pending: openssl rand -hex 32 → Vercel env UNSUBSCRIBE_HMAC_SECRET. 11 days to April 28 Vinted send.

schema.pause: Map of agent_name to condition (paused or until_next_bolt_commit or until_lead_directive)
schema.force_next: Agent name to force as next scheduled, or null. Cleared after use.
schema.interval_override: Map of agent_name to run_every integer
